services.title: Managed Detection & Response
services.description: 24/7 follow-the-sun SOC powered by behavioral analytics and battle-tested runbooks. Mean-time-to-detect under 5 minutes.

services.title: Cloud & Container Security
services.description: Harden your AWS, Azure, GCP and Kubernetes estate with CSPM, CWPP, IaC scanning and runtime protection.

services.title: Identity & Access
services.description: Modernize IAM, PAM and ITDR. Eliminate standing privilege and shut down identity-based attack paths.

services.title: Offensive Security
services.description: Red team, adversary emulation and continuous penetration testing aligned to MITRE ATT&CK techniques.

services.title: Incident Response
services.description: Containment in hours, not weeks. Retainer-backed digital forensics and breach response on standby.

services.title: GRC & Advisory
services.description: Risk, compliance and board-level advisory across SOC 2, ISO 27001, PCI, HIPAA, NIS2 and the EU AI Act.

solutions.title: Zero Trust Architecture
solutions.description: Design and deploy a zero trust framework spanning identity, device, network, application and data — without slowing down your business.

solutions.title: SOC Modernization
solutions.tagline: From alert factory to mission-driven operations.
solutions.description: Re-architect your security operations with AI-assisted triage, automation, and a measurable threat-informed defense strategy.

solutions.title: Data Protection & DLP
solutions.tagline: Govern, classify and defend your most valuable asset.
solutions.description: End-to-end data security combining classification, encryption, DLP and insider risk — designed for hybrid and SaaS environments.

solutions.title: OT, IoT & Critical Infrastructure
solutions.tagline: Bridge the IT/OT divide. Protect what matters.
solutions.description: Specialized programs for manufacturing, energy, transportation and healthcare — passive monitoring, segmentation and asset visibility.

solutions.title: AI & LLM Security
solutions.tagline: Adopt AI with confidence and control.
solutions.description: Secure your AI lifecycle — model risk, prompt injection, data leakage, supply chain — aligned to NIST AI RMF and the EU AI Act.

solutions.title: Application & Product Security
solutions.tagline: Secure software at the speed of DevOps.
solutions.description: Shift left and shield right with SAST, SCA, ASPM, threat modeling and developer enablement built into your SDLC.

testimonials.quote: Sentinel rebuilt our global SOC in under six months. We retired three legacy tools, cut alert noise by 74% and finally have a defensible posture our board can understand.
testimonials.name: Maya Okonkwo

testimonials.quote: Their incident response team contained a ransomware operator inside our environment in under four hours. The clarity and discipline they brought during a crisis was extraordinary.
testimonials.name: David Reinhart

testimonials.quote: We needed a partner who could speak DevSecOps, cloud and the boardroom. Sentinel is the only firm we trust to do all three credibly.
testimonials.name: Priya Raman

testimonials.quote: From zero trust strategy to AI governance, Sentinel's advisors are easily the most pragmatic and technically deep we have ever worked with.
testimonials.name: Jonas Lindqvist

caseStudies.title: A global bank rolled out Zero Trust to 140,000 employees in 18 months
caseStudies.excerpt: Sentinel designed and operationalized a zero trust program spanning identity, device posture and network microsegmentation across 62 countries.

caseStudies.title: Modernizing the SOC of a North American energy provider
caseStudies.excerpt: A unified XDR and detection-as-code pipeline replaced three legacy SIEMs, cutting alert volume by 74% and bringing MTTR under 18 minutes.

caseStudies.title: Cloud security for a Fortune 100 healthcare provider
caseStudies.excerpt: A multi-cloud security mesh across AWS, Azure and 9,000 Kubernetes workloads — protecting PHI for 40M patients without slowing engineering.
